programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Akan Aku Treat Kamu Bagaikan Ratu
programme.desc: Naomi, a simple beautiful girl who never expected that her biological mother is a wealthy person. She owns a large company which is also managed by Tristan. Because Naomi initially lived on the streets, her mother instructed Tristan to transform Naomi into an elegant woman. Naomi has to follow her mother and adhere to all the rules imposed, including learning to manage office work. However, as tim

programme.title: Bos Gue Kekasih Gue, Maaf Saya Khilaf
programme.desc: Mita is a barista at a coffee shop. Without her knowing it, her boss has fallen in love with her.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Emang Boleh Punya Senyum Selucu Itu
programme.desc: Lili, Rio's mistress, is pregnant and meets Nisa. Nisa is very angry and disappointed with Rio until their relationship eventually ends. Nisa heals her broken heart by going hiking with Fajar. Journalists continue to pursue Nisa and assume that Fajar is her new crush.

programme.title: Kukira Putus Ternyata Love You Terus
programme.desc: Eve has to face an annoying boss. The boss refuses to accept anything from her if she is late. If Eve is even one minute late, the boss will scold her. One day, in a fit of anger, Eve insults her boss for always being single. However, one night, Eve finds her boss on the rooftop and mistakenly believes that her boss is trying to end her life. What happens next?

programme.title: Aku Butuh Ayang Walau Tuhan Maha Penyayang
programme.desc: Naya takes care of a man named Leo who cannot walk due to an accident during illegal motorcycle racing. Leo's mother says that Leo is a closed child and has no friends. She asks Naya to get along with taking care of Leo. Naya promises Leo's mother that she will take care of and help Leo until he recovers. Naya patiently looks after Leo, assisting him during physical therapy. Unexpectedly, Leo deve

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: POV Punya Pacar Semanis Kamu
programme.desc: Alexa (Larasati Nugroho) is still in a relationship with her fiancé. However, it turns out that her fiancé is cheating on her behind her back. Strangely enough, Alexa ends up starting a relationship with the driver named Bram (Lavicky Nicholas).

programme.desc: A few shrewd but oddball fund managers and traders bet against the US mortgage system's stability.

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: The husband of Margaret Keane, a phenomenal painter, wrongfully claims credit for her works and enjoys her success until a legal battle between the two reveals the truth to the world.

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: Martin Baron joins the Boston Globe as an editor and pushes four journalists to pursue a story about the child molestation charges against the local church.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Julie Powell, a young blogger, is determined to emulate Julia Child's cooking techniques. Though separated by time, the two women share a common passion for food that intertwines their lives.

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Tired of Chris's professional failures, his wife decides to separate, leaving him financially broke with an unpaid internship in a brokerage firm and his son's custody to deal with.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.
